hero.title: We are continuously looking to recruit
hero.subtitle: who are PASSIONATE about working in a
hero.closing: and possess a strong work ethic.

jobs.title: INVESTMENT / RESEARCH ASSOCIATE
requirements: Have a minimum of 3 years of experience as an investment analyst, research analyst or similar role
Have an undergraduate degree or other such equivalent qualification relating to finance, economics, engineering or technology fields.
Possess excellent communication, articulation and investment due-diligence skills

jobs.title: OPERATIONS MANAGER
jobs.role: Duties will include the supervision of construction sites, assistance in sales/marketing and assistance in identifying suitable properties for future projects.
jobs.experience: Candidates should ideally have work experience relating to Engineering/Quantity Surveying/Site Supervision and Operations: preferably in the construction, land sales or real estate development industry
jobs.qualifications: An academic qualification relating to Civil Engineering would be an added advantage.
